title: draba borealis
intro: Draba borealis, also known as the Arctic whitlowgrass, is a small, annual plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Draba borealis include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use in treating wounds and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Draba borealis can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
